name: Japan Station Master (Entity-Resolved)
temporal_coverage: 2026 snapshot (ODPT catalog state + MLIT N02-24 as of harvest date)
geographic_coverage: Japan (nationwide). The 425 Greater-Tokyo stations from ODPT (English romaji + operator-declared transfer links) are preserved unchanged from v1; nationwide stations are added from MLIT 国土数値情報 N02 — see README.
license: CC BY 4.0 (data) + MIT (pipeline code) — see LICENSE-DATA.txt and LICENSE
doi_version_v2: PENDING — assigned when v2.0.0 is released on Zenodo
source: Public Transportation Open Data Center (ODPT) — odpt:Station/Operator/Railway (425 Tokyo stations); MLIT 国土数値情報 N02-24 (鉄道) — nationwide stations/lines/operators; Wikidata (CC0) — English station names; kuromoji (IPADIC) — Hepburn fallback for names without a Wikidata match
